bio.p1: I have over {{years}} years developing software for various sectors of national and international companies. Throughout this journey, I have built solutions ranging from MVP to scaled product, always focused on performance and quality.
bio.p2: In projects, I don't limit myself only to technologies, I seek to deeply understand products and their markets. My goal is not just to deliver code, but real value to clients and the business.
bio.p3: I am passionate about traveling and meeting new people and cultures. Thanks to my career, I have had the opportunity to visit all 5 regions of Brazil and more than 18 countries. I am always open to colleagues, managers, and professionals, feel free to get in touch.

value.title: Beyond the Code
value.description: I don't limit myself to technologies, I dive into products and markets to deliver real value, not just features.

product.title: Business Mindset
product.description: I understand the context and impact of each technical decision on client and company outcomes.

global.title: Global Perspective
global.description: 5 regions of Brazil and 18+ countries lived. Diversity of perspectives shapes how I approach problems.

open.title: Always Open
open.description: Open to colleagues, managers, and professionals. I believe the best ideas come from exchange.
